page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg9i.large is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 2 dedicated physical cores and 2 vCPUs with a single thread per core, utilizing an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor clocked at 3.4 GHz. The instance is configured with 8.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include local storage or bundled GPU resources, meaning storage requirements must be met through external network-attached volumes. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures that the 3.4 GHz processor cores deliver consistent compute performance without resource sharing or CPU credit limitations.

Given its balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and dedicated Intel Xeon cores, the ecs.hfg9i.large is suited for general-purpose workloads, lightweight web serving, application hosting, and small-scale database tasks that require predictable CPU performance without massive memory or storage footprints.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg9i.large is an x86_64 general-purpose virtual machine instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 2 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 2 physical Intel Xeon 6982P-C cores operating at 3.4 GHz, with 1 thread per core. The system includes 8.0 GB of RAM, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. This instance does not feature local storage or integrated GPUs, relying on external network storage, and offers a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. With its dedicated CPU allocation and high clock speed, it provides stable performance for general-purpose workloads, small databases, and web serving applications.

tagline: A dedicated dual-core compute instance with balanced memory allocation and predictable performance for general-purpose workloads.
